calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-02-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Frank J. Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendants Bun Warmers Firewood-Statuary & Nursery, Inc. or Michael Henderson.
Defaults were entered against defendants on August 13, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on August 13, 2008.
Order waiving appearance of witness at the default prove-up hearing was filed on September 23, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendants Bun Warmers Firewood-Statuary & Nursery, Inc. and Michael Henderson as follows:

Damages/Principal - $138,072.35.
Prejudgment Interest - $5,825.82.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $410.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $146,808.17.

It if further ordered that plaintiff Bank of the West is the owner of the following leased equipment: one 2000 Freightliner Classic XL VIN# 1FUPCSEB5YDB06584; HYD. Wet Kit; New Firestone Inlew of Caps; one 2006 Peterbilt 379 Tractor, VIN# XP5DB9X96N832646; one 2007 Hyundai Dry Van Trailer Vin# 3H3V532C571142022.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
